Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in Gwinnett County, GA?

688 lawyers and law firms across 12 cities in Gwinnett County are listed here, 496 firms and 192 solo attorneys.

Which cities in Gwinnett County have lawyers listed?

Lawrenceville (180), Duluth (151), Norcross (104), Suwanee (65), Peachtree Corners (61), Snellville (48), Buford (40), Lilburn (19), and more.

Who is a top rated lawyer in Gwinnett County?

The Scott Pryor Law Group - Personal Injury & ﻿Accident Attorneys in Lawrenceville is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 1520 reviews.

About ArtivicolabContact usPrivacyTerms

Attorney advertising. Georgia Lawyer Directory is an independent directory, not a law firm or lawyer referral service, and does not provide legal advice or endorse any attorney. Listings marked Premium are paid placements; rankings reflect ratings and verified reviews and are not for sale. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome. Contacting an attorney through this site does not create an attorney client relationship.
